title: Avrea: $4.7 Million Raised For Next-Generation CI/CD Platform Built For The Age Of AI
summary:
Avrea, a next-generation Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) platform built for the emerging agentic AI era, has officially launched from stealth after raising $4.7 million in pre-seed funding led by EarlyBird.

title: Certo: $4 Million Seed Funding Raised For AI-Powered Consumer Goods Compliance Platform
summary:
Daphni announced that it led a $4 million seed round in Certo, a company building AI agents for regulatory compliance across the beauty and consumer goods industries.

title: Fidelity Collective Acquires Westone Audio And Etymotic
summary:
Fidelity Collective has acquired Westone Audio and Etymotic, bringing two of the personal audio industry’s most respected brands under new ownership and leadership. The acquisition closed on May 15, 2026, with both companies now operating under the leadership of Sam Roney as CEO and Tal Kocen as COO.
The post Fidelity Collective Acquires Westone Audio And Etymotic appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Curewise: Interview With Founder & CEO Steve Brown About The AI-Based Precision Medicine Insights Company
summary:
CureWise is an AI-powered platform that empowers cancer patients to navigate their diagnosis by connecting medical records, explaining complex clinical data, and identifying personalized treatment options and clinical trials. Pulse 2.0 interviewed CureWise founder and CEO Steve Brown to learn more.

title: Poppulo Acquires Sociabble To Expand AI-Powered Employee Experience Platform
summary:
Poppulo announced the acquisition of Sociabble, a Paris-based employee engagement platform, in a move designed to strengthen its AI-powered employee communications and engagement capabilities across the enterprise workforce.

title: Kayne Anderson Real Estate: $5.12 Billion Raised For Oversubscribed Opportunistic Equity Fund
summary:
Kayne Anderson Real Estate announced the final close of Kayne Anderson Real Estate Partners VII, L.P. (KAREP VII), raising $5.12 billion in capital commitments and making it the largest opportunistic equity fund in the firm’s history. The fund significantly surpassed its initial $3 billion target following strong investor demand.
The post Kayne Anderson Real Estate: $5.12 Billion Raised For Oversubscribed Opportunistic Equity Fund appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: NOG: CA$350 Million Duvernay Acquisition Marks Strategic Entry Into Canada
summary:
Northern Oil and Gas announced that it has agreed to acquire a 25% undivided non-operated interest in light-oil producing assets in Alberta’s Duvernay East Shale Basin from Parallax Energy Operating Inc. for an initial unadjusted purchase price of CA$350 million, approximately US$259 million.

title: Champion Homes: Acquisition Of Homes Direct Retail Locations Expands Western U.S. Footprint
summary:
Champion Homes announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire the assets of Homes Direct, representing 11 retail locations across key Western U.S. markets including Arizona, California, Colorado, New Mexico, and Oregon.

title: Lilly: Up To $780 Million Acquisition Of LimmaTech Biologics Advances Next-Generation Bacterial Vaccines
summary:
LimmaTech Biologics AG announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Eli Lilly and Company in a deal valued at up to $780 million in cash, including an upfront payment and additional milestone-based payments tied to clinical and regulatory achievements.
